input.content:
# Solar System Card — Design ## Architecture Overview ```mermaid graph TB subgraph browser["Browser — card.js Tier 1, no sidecar"] CARD[card.js
CARD_SHIM global
mica injected] CARD -->|creates| SCENE[Three.js Scene] CARD -->|creates| RENDERER[WebGL Renderer
antialias + alpha] CARD -->|creates| CAMERA[Perspective Camera
FOV 60 degrees] CARD -->|controls| CTRL[OrbitControls
zoom / pan / rotate] SCENE -->|contains| SUN[Sun mesh
emissive glow] SCENE -->|contains| PLANETS[8 Planet meshes
MeshStandardMaterial] SCENE -->|contains| RINGS[Saturn RingGeometry
ring texture] SCENE -->|contains| ORBITS[Orbital path lines
THREE.Line dashed] SCENE -->|contains| STARS[Starfield
THREE.Points] SCENE -->|contains| LABELS[Planet name labels
HTML overlay] CARD -->|manages| ANIM[Animation loop
requestAnimationFrame] ANIM -->|updates| ORBITAL[Orbital positions
Kepler third law] ANIM -->|updates| ROTATION[Axial rotation] CARD -->|drives| INFO[Info panel
DOM overlay] CARD -->|loads via| TEX[THREE.TextureLoader
NASA / Wikimedia URLs] TEX -->|fallback| COLOR[Procedural color sphere] CARD -->|disposes via| DESTROY[onDestroy hook] end subgraph external["External resources"] CDN[Three.js 0.160.0 UMD
cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm] CTRL_ESM[OrbitControls ESM
dynamic import] TEX_NASA[NASA / Wikimedia
public-domain textures] end CDN -->|metadata.scripts| CARD CTRL_ESM -->|dynamic import| CARD TEX_NASA -->|TextureLoader URLs| TEX ``` ## Component Breakdown ```mermaid graph LR subgraph cardClass["solar-system card class"] META[metadata.json
name: solar-system
badge: SST
handler: ~
sidecar: ~
scripts: three.min.js] HTML[card.html
fragment — empty
Three.js renders into container] CSS[card.css
overlay styles —
labels, info panel,
starfield cursor] JS[card.js
main logic —
init / animate / cleanup] end META -->|registers| CLASS HTML -->|paired with| CLASS CSS -->|paired with| CLASS JS -->|paired with| CLASS CLASS -->|instances on| CANVAS[canvas/ — .solar-system extension] ``` ## Data Flow — Init to Animate ```mermaid sequenceDiagram participant U as User participant C as card.js participant T as Three.js participant L as TextureLoader participant A as Animation loop U->>C: Card loads on canvas C->>C: Create scene, camera, renderer C->>C: Add OrbitControls C->>C: Create Sun mesh (emissive) C->>C: Create 8 planet meshes C->>C: Create Saturn ring geometry C->>C: Create orbital path lines C->>C: Create starfield points C->>C: Create HTML labels + info panel C->>L: Load textures (parallel) L-->>C: Textures loaded or fallback C->>T: Append scene to container C->>T: Set up resize handler loop every frame A->>C: requestAnimationFrame C->>A: Update orbital positions
Kepler's law: omega = 2*PI/T C->>A: Rotate planets on axis C->>T: Render scene C->>C: Update label positions end U->>C: User zooms / pans / rotates C->>C: OrbitControls handles input C->>T: Re-render with new camera ``` ## Planet Data Model ```mermaid classDiagram class PlanetConfig { string name float distance semi-major axis (Earth = 10) float period orbital period (Earth = 1 year) float size sphere radius float tilt axial tilt in degrees float speed rotation speed string textureUrl NASA / Wikimedia URL string color procedural fallback } class Planet { Mesh mesh Group group float phase initial orbital offset float angle current orbital angle +update(time) +rotate() +dispose() } class SaturnRings { Mesh ringMesh RingGeometry +update() +dispose() } class Starfield { Points points BufferGeometry +createStars(count) +dispose() } class InfoPanel { HTMLElement container +showPlanet(name, info) +hide() } PlanetConfig --> Planet : configures Planet *-- SaturnRings PlanetConfig : 8 instances --> Planet ``` ## File Layout ```mermaid graph LR ROOT[.mica/card-classes/solar-system/] ROOT --> META[metadata.json] ROOT --> HTML[card.html] ROOT --> CSS[card.css] ROOT --> JS[card.js] CANVAS[canvas/] CANVAS --> S1[solar-system.solar-system
card instance] META -.->|extends| CLASS HTML -.->|extends| CLASS CSS -.->|extends| CLASS JS -.->|extends| CLASS class ROOT fill:#2d2d2d,stroke:#666,color:#fff class META,HTML,CSS,JS fill:#1e1e1e,stroke:#444,color:#ccc class CANVAS,S1 fill:#252526,stroke:#555,color:#aaa ``` ## Key Invariants - **No sidecar** — all computation is client-side (Tier 1). No server.py or server.ts needed. - **No handler** — no LLM, no classification, no subprocess. `handler: ~` in metadata. - **Texture fallback** — if any NASA texture fails to load, a procedural colored sphere is used. No crash. - **Cleanup** — `onDestroy` disposes all Three.js geometries, materials, textures, and cancels `requestAnimationFrame`. - **No localStorage** — no persistence. Each card instance is fresh. - **No mica API calls** — the card does not call `mica.files`, `mica.openChannel`, or `mica.fetch`. It is purely self-contained.

The user is saying "error" again. Let me check - they're pointing out there's still an error in the MMD file. The issue is likely the same pipe character problem in mermaid diagrams. Let me look at the file I just wrote - I see the issue: in the PlanetConfig class, I have lines like:

```
float distance    semi-major axis (Earth = 10)
```

These are missing pipe characters but the formatting might be causing issues. Actually wait, looking at mermaid class diagrams, the syntax for class members is typically:

```
ClassName {
    type name
    description
}
```

But the way I formatted it with comments after the type/name might be causing issues. Let me fix the mermaid class diagram syntax.

Actually, looking more carefully, the issue is that mermaid class diagrams don't support inline comments like that. The lines like:
```
float distance    semi-major axis (Earth = 10)
```

This is invalid mermaid syntax. In mermaid class diagrams, you define members as:
```
ClassName {
    +type memberName
    or
    +type memberName : description
}
```

Let me fix this with proper mermaid class diagram syntax.

input.old_string:
class PlanetConfig {
        string name
        float distance    semi-major axis (Earth = 10)
        float period      orbital period (Earth = 1 year)
        float size        sphere radius
        float tilt        axial tilt in degrees
        float speed       rotation speed
        string textureUrl NASA / Wikimedia URL
        string color      procedural fallback
    }

    class Planet {
        Mesh mesh
        Group group
        float phase       initial orbital offset
        float angle       current orbital angle
        +update(time)
        +rotate()
        +dispose()
    }

    class SaturnRings {
        Mesh ringMesh
        RingGeometry
        +update()
        +dispose()
    }

    class Starfield {
        Points points
        BufferGeometry
        +createStars(count)
        +dispose()
    }

    class InfoPanel {
        HTMLElement container
        +showPlanet(name, info)
        +hide()
    }

    PlanetConfig --> Planet : configures
    Planet *-- SaturnRings
    PlanetConfig : 8 instances --> Planet
input.new_string:
class PlanetConfig {
        +string name
        +float distance
        +float period
        +float size
        +float tilt
        +float speed
        +string textureUrl
        +string color
    }

    class Planet {
        +Mesh mesh
        +Group group
        +float phase
        +float angle
        +update(time)
        +rotate()
        +dispose()
    }

    class SaturnRings {
        +Mesh ringMesh
        +RingGeometry geometry
        +update()
        +dispose()
    }

    class Starfield {
        +Points points
        +BufferGeometry geometry
        +createStars(count)
        +dispose()
    }

    class InfoPanel {
        +HTMLElement container
        +showPlanet(name, info)
        +hide()
    }

    PlanetConfig --> Planet : configures
    Planet *-- SaturnRings
    PlanetConfig : 8 instances --> Planet
